title: Buffer Overflow, Underflow, and Copy Boundaries · Object-Lifetime Lens: Pointer Underflow
summary: A network frame rewriter moves overlapping regions and an off-by-one defect writes before or beyond the packet buffer. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem pointer underflow increment in bounded frame transformation. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Prevent subtraction and backward scans from forming pointers before the first element.
Choose memcpy only for proven non-overlap and memmove for overlapping byte ranges.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Pointer Underflow · Theory Pointer Underflow
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory native-systems team handles memory case 5151. Produce bounded C evidence to move overlapping bytes inside proven bounds; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates.
